title: Scaling Prospects: Building Large-Scale Neutral Atom Quantum Computers
description: Explore the roadmap for scaling neutral atom quantum computers to thousands of qubits. Analyze the technical challenges, architectural innovations, and potential advantages that position neutral atoms as a leading platform for practical quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Analyze current system sizes and near-term scaling trajectories
Identify key technical challenges for scaling to 1000+ qubits
Understand architectural choices for large-scale systems
Compare neutral atom scalability with other quantum computing platforms
Evaluate error correction requirements and logical qubit prospects
